Localization.Description: Login to the ESMC web console

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} logged out of the ESMC web console on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to the ESMC web console on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged in to the ESMC web console on host {event_src.host}
